skills.name: save-content
skills.description: Save any URL (tweet, TikTok, Instagram post, Reddit thread, YouTube video, or any link) to your 4Stash for later.

skills.name: organize-lists
skills.description: Create and manage lists to organize saved content by topic, project, or category.

skills.name: browse-stash
skills.description: Browse, search, and revisit all previously saved content across all lists.
